workshoptitle: Build an OCM Demo: VMware to OLVM in OCI

tutorials.title: Introduction
tutorials.description: Review the OCM demo build goals, scope, prerequisites, and source material limits.

tutorials.title: Lab 1: Review the OCM Demo Architecture
tutorials.description: Review the OCVS source, OLVM target, OCM migration flow, and required build values.

tutorials.title: Lab 2: Prepare OCI Prerequisites
tutorials.description: Prepare tenancy access, compartment, vault, and non-overlapping network ranges.

tutorials.title: Lab 3: Deploy the OCVS Source Environment
tutorials.description: Deploy a single-host OCVS SDDC and connect its workload network to OCI resources.

tutorials.title: Lab 4: Access and Prepare the VMware Source Workload
tutorials.description: Create a jump host, access vCenter and NSX, upload the Oracle Linux ISO, and build the source VM.

tutorials.title: Lab 5: Prepare the OLVM Target
tutorials.description: Verify the OLVM target engine, hosts, storage, networking, templates, and AAA readiness.

tutorials.title: Lab 6: Prepare Oracle Cloud Migrations
tutorials.description: Configure OCM prerequisites, remote agent appliance, VDDK dependency, VMware discovery, and OLVM discovery.

tutorials.title: Lab 7: Migrate the Workload with Oracle Cloud Migrations
tutorials.description: Create the OLVM migration project, configure replication and target placement, generate the Resource Manager stack, and run the migration.

tutorials.title: Lab 8: Validate the Migrated VM
tutorials.description: Validate the migrated VM in OLVM and capture repeatable demo notes.

tutorials.title: Need Help?
tutorials.description: Solutions to common problems and directions for receiving LiveLabs help.
